testcase.name: test_cl_preview_pdf_returns_valid_pdf
testcase.error: tests/test_iteration65_features.py:108: in setup_test_data assert response.status_code == 201, f"Failed to create fornitore: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create fornitore: {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","address"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":{"via":"Via Fornitore 1","cap":"12345","citta":"Milano","provincia":"MI"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 == 201 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cl_preview_pdf_404_for_nonexistent
testcase.error: tests/test_iteration65_features.py:108: in setup_test_data assert response.status_code == 201, f"Failed to create fornitore: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create fornitore: {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","address"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":{"via":"Via Fornitore 1","cap":"12345","citta":"Milano","provincia":"MI"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 == 201 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
